nodes.label: AI understanding of customer queries
nodes.grounding_span: AI has a lot of trouble understanding anything but the most basic questions

nodes.label: AI accuracy in pulling relevant articles
nodes.grounding_span: It also often pulls up the wrong articles because it misunderstands what the customer is asking about

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the loss of human jobs

nodes.label: AI grasp of human nuance and tone
nodes.label_negative: AI missing human nuance and tone
nodes.grounding_span: AI can fake empathy, but it can't really feel it and perform it like a human can

nodes.label: AI handling of edge cases and grey areas
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to handle edge cases and grey areas
nodes.grounding_span: There are also lots of edge cases where it's not black and white and human judgment is needed

nodes.label: AI environmental impact
nodes.grounding_span: AI, and especially the more powerful ones, use up so many natural resources

nodes.label: Job security and human employment
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about the loss of human jobs

nodes.label: Customer service quality
nodes.grounding_span: our quality of customer service going down

nodes.label: Human connection and empathy
nodes.grounding_span: human connection doesn't have that pattern

nodes.label: Environmental sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: use up so many natural resources

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding
nodes.grounding_span: AI has a lot of trouble understanding anything but the most basic questions

nodes.label: Anxiety about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: It makes me anxious about my future at the company

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I don't agree that an AI could do it as well as a person

nodes.label: Conditional openness to AI if job security assured
nodes.grounding_span: if I could feel confident that it really was there to help us and not a way for corporate to eventually replace us, I would find things about it useful

nodes.label: Concern about AI environmental cost
nodes.grounding_span: I am interested how they will balance using AI with those commitments

nodes.label: Pattern recognition in AI failure modes
nodes.grounding_span: I can usually tell within the first few messages if the AI has gotten a handle on what the customer is asking or not

nodes.label: Pragmatic skepticism based on observed outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to work around it as much as I can for as long as I can
